posts.author: Singrauli
posts.text: Anthropic files for IPO — I would rather regret than applying for it. BTW anyways is it possible for indian residential can apply for a US IPO?

posts.author: SpacemanSpiff
posts.text: Anthropic files for IPO — Apparently they grew 80x. WIth this kind of growth why list for ipo and sell stake early? Wait a few years and you can multiply valuation to some much higher fantasy number. Maybe i am stupid, but i would stay far far away from all of these ipos, spacex too. It also seems reasonable that all of these AI models will eventually converge into similar things as input data is same-ish, so they might become commodities.

posts.author: Sankalp
posts.text: Anthropic files for IPO — IMG_4704 1179×2010 333 KB Is there any way for indian investors to apply for this IPO? Feels like one of those rare opportunities that could potentially create generational wealth over the long term.
